title: cyperus pseudokyllingioides var. africanus
intro: Cyperus pseudokyllingioides var. africanus, also known as East African Cyperus, is a variant of the Cyperus pseudokyllingioides plant species, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus pseudokyllingioides var. africanus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal preparations such as tonics and ointments.
